case_title: ROBINSON, MICHAEL D. VS HOWARD, DAVID

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, DAVID
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HOWARD, DAVID HEARING SET FOR JUL-18-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, MICHAEL D. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOWARD, DAVID PER STIPULATION OF PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY ROBINSON, MICHAEL D. AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, MICHAEL D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOWARD, DAVID $482.25 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $497.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-18-1997, GRANTED
